preferredChannel.description:
Communication channel:
- `email` — Transactional/marketing email
- `sms` — SMS to mobile
- `push` — Mobile push notification
- `document_digital` — PDF via secure online portal
- `document_postal` — Physical postal mail
- `auto` — Smart routing (platform selects optimal channel)
preferredChannel.title: Channel

optedOut.description:
Global opt-out flag. When `true`, no communications will be sent to this
party regardless of channel.

items.description:
Communication channel:
- `email` — Transactional/marketing email
- `sms` — SMS to mobile
- `push` — Mobile push notification
- `document_digital` — PDF via secure online portal
- `document_postal` — Physical postal mail
- `auto` — Smart routing (platform selects optimal channel)
items.title: Channel

channelOptOuts.description: Individual channels the party has opted out of

contactDetails.description: Direct contact information for an unknown party

phone.description: Phone number in E.164 format (required for sms/push channels)

contactDetails.title: ContactDetails
